Issue: Raise exception when user-specified reader package is not installed
Decision: Raise OptionalImportError when user specifies a reader that isn't installed
Rationale: Improves error messages by adding pip install hints to OptionalImportError for missing reader packages
Author: haoyu-haoyu
Cost: Minimal resource cost (only changes error handling in user-specified reader path)
Risk: Potential disruption to existing workflows that rely on silent fallback behavior

Argument.author: haoyu-haoyu
Argument.argument: Preserved the original error message while adding pip install hints by using str(e) to extract package name and prepending install command

Argument.author: haoyu-haoyu
Argument.argument: Comparison of 5 PRs shows #8771 uniquely provides pip install hints in error messages, improving usability while maintaining MONAI's OptionalImportError convention
